---
title: "OC17 refined MAGs catabolic gene trees"
output: html_document
date: "2024-06-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
```

#Set up
```{r set directories}
rootdir = "/scratch/users/rsalcedo/OC17wc_deepauto/genome_based/"
proteindir = "/scratch/users/rsalcedo/OC17wc_deepauto/genome_based/refined_analysis/refined_prodigal/faa"
genedir = "/scratch/users/rsalcedo/OC17wc_deepauto/genome_based/refined_analysis/refined_kofamscan/csv_processed"
tables5 = read.csv(paste(rootdir, "refined_analysis/refined_auto_MAGs_06152026.csv", sep = ""))
```

# Define Functions
```{r define get gene function}
find_genes <- function(
    search_strings,
    tables5,
    genedir,
    proteindir,
    output_file,
    file_extension_csv = ".fa_processed.csv",
    file_extension_faa = ".fa_prodigalORFs.faa"
) {

  # -----------------------------
  # Step 1: Find genomes matching KO terms
  # -----------------------------
  results_list <- list()

  for (search_string in search_strings) {
    matching_rows <- subset(
      tables5,
      grepl(search_string, KO, ignore.case = TRUE)
    )

    results_list[[search_string]] <- unique(matching_rows$genome)
  }

  # -----------------------------
  # Step 2: Extract gene IDs
  # -----------------------------
  match_results <- list()

  for (search_string in names(results_list)) {

    for (prefix in results_list[[search_string]]) {

      file_path <- file.path(
        genedir,
        paste0(prefix, file_extension_csv)
      )

      if (!file.exists(file_path)) next

      csv_data <- read.csv(file_path)

      current_matches <- character()

      for (i in seq_len(nrow(csv_data))) {

        row_has_match <- any(
          sapply(
            csv_data[i, ],
            function(x)
              grepl(search_string,
                    as.character(x),
                    ignore.case = TRUE)
          )
        )

        if (row_has_match) {
          current_matches <- c(
            current_matches,
            csv_data[i, "gene"]
          )
        }
      }

      match_results[[paste(search_string,
                           prefix,
                           sep = "_")]] <- current_matches
    }
  }

  # -----------------------------
  # Step 3: Build genes_df
  # -----------------------------
  genes_df <- do.call(rbind, match_results)
  genes_df <- as.data.frame(genes_df)

  names(genes_df)[1] <- "gene_id"

  genes_df$gene_id <- gsub(
    "O",
    ">O",
    genes_df$gene_id
  )

  genes_df$genome <- rownames(genes_df)

  genes_df$KO <- stringr::str_split_i(
    genes_df$genome,
    "_",
    1
  )

  rownames(genes_df) <- NULL

  genes_df$genome <- sub(
    "^[^_]+_",
    "",
    genes_df$genome
  )

  # -----------------------------
  # Step 4: Extract protein sequences
  # -----------------------------
  results <- vector("list", nrow(genes_df))

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(genes_df))) {

    genome_prefix <- genes_df$genome[i]
    gene_id <- genes_df$gene_id[i]

    file_path <- file.path(
      proteindir,
      paste0(genome_prefix,
             file_extension_faa)
    )

    if (!file.exists(file_path)) next

    file_content <- readLines(file_path)

    matching_line_index <- which(
      grepl(
        paste0(gene_id, " "),
        file_content,
        fixed = TRUE
      )
    )

    if (length(matching_line_index) == 0) next

    start_index <- matching_line_index + 1

    following_lines <- character()

    for (j in start_index:length(file_content)) {

      if (grepl("^>", file_content[j])) {
        break
      }

      following_lines <- c(
        following_lines,
        file_content[j]
      )
    }

    results[[i]] <- data.frame(
      genome = genome_prefix,
      gene_id = gene_id,
      following_lines = paste(
        following_lines,
        collapse = ""
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  # -----------------------------
  # Combine results and reorder columns
  # -----------------------------
  protein_df <- do.call(rbind, results)
  
  final_results_df <- merge(
    protein_df,
    genes_df,
    by = c("genome", "gene_id")
  )
  
  # Remove V2 if it exists
  if ("V2" %in% names(final_results_df)) {
    final_results_df$V2 <- NULL
  }
  
  # Reorder columns
  final_results_df <- final_results_df[
    , c("genome",
        "gene_id",
        "KO",
        "following_lines")
  ]
  
  write.csv(
    final_results_df,
    output_file,
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  return(final_results_df)
  
}
```

```{r csv to fasta function}
csv_to_fasta <- function(
    csv_file,
    fasta_file
) {

  # Read CSV
  df <- read.csv(
    csv_file,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  # Check required columns exist
  required_cols <- c(
    "genome",
    "gene_id",
    "KO",
    "following_lines"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(
    required_cols,
    names(df)
  )

  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(
      paste(
        "Missing columns:",
        paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }

  # Create FASTA entries
  fasta_lines <- unlist(
    lapply(seq_len(nrow(df)), function(i) {

      header <- paste0(
        "",
        df$gene_id[i],
        " # ",
        df$genome[i],
        " # ",
        df$KO[i]
      )

      sequence <- df$following_lines[i]

      c(header, sequence)
    })
  )

  # Write FASTA
  writeLines(
    fasta_lines,
    fasta_file
  )

  cat(
    "FASTA written to:",
    fasta_file,
    "\n"
  )
}
```

#Pull Genes
```{r dsrAB and SDO}
search <- c("K17725", "K11180", "K11181")

results <- find_genes(
  search_strings = search,
  tables5 = tables5,
  genedir = genedir,
  proteindir = proteindir,
  output_file = file.path(
    rootdir,
    "refined_analysis/gene_trees/sulfur_genes_06152026.csv"
  )
)

csv_to_fasta(
  csv_file = paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/gene_trees/sulfur_genes_06152026.csv"),
  fasta_file = paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/gene_trees/sulfur_genes_06152026.fasta")
)
```

```{r amo/pmo}
search <- c("K10944", "K10945", "K10946")

results <- find_genes(
  search_strings = search,
  tables5 = tables5,
  genedir = genedir,
  proteindir = proteindir,
  output_file = file.path(
    rootdir,
    "refined_analysis/gene_trees/amo_pmo_genes_06152026.csv"
  )
)

csv_to_fasta(
  csv_file = paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/gene_trees/amo_pmo_genes_06152026.csv"),
  fasta_file = paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/gene_trees/amo_pmo_genes_06152026.fasta")
)
```

```{r nxr/nar}
search <- c("K00370", "K00371")

results <- find_genes(
  search_strings = search,
  tables5 = tables5,
  genedir = genedir,
  proteindir = proteindir,
  output_file = file.path(
    rootdir,
    "refined_analysis/gene_trees/nxr_nar_genes_06152026.csv"
  )
)

csv_to_fasta(
  csv_file = paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/gene_trees/nxr_nar_genes_06152026.csv"),
  fasta_file = paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/gene_trees/nxr_nar_genes_06152026.fasta")
)
```

#Make Trees
```{r function to make phylogenetic tree scripts}
make_phylo_scripts <- function(gene_set, ref_file, gene_file) {
  
  outdir <- paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/gene_trees/", gene_set, "/")
  
  combined <- paste0(outdir, gene_set, "_combined.faa")
  aligned  <- paste0(outdir, gene_set, "_aligned.faa")
  trimmed  <- paste0(outdir, gene_set, "_trimmed.faa")
  tree     <- paste0(outdir, gene_set, "_FastTree.tree")
  
  # 1. CAT SCRIPT
  sink(paste0(rootdir, "sh_scripts/", gene_set, "_cat.sh"))
  
  cat(
    "sbatch -J ", gene_set, "_cat -c 1 --mem-per-cpu 4G -p serc -t 02:00:00 --wrap 'cat ",
    ref_file,
    " ",
    gene_file,
    " > ",
    combined,
    "'\n",
    sep=""
  )
  
  sink()

  # 2. MAFFT SCRIPT
  sink(paste0(rootdir, "sh_scripts/", gene_set, "_mafft.sh"))
  
  cat(
    "sbatch -J ", gene_set, "_mafft -c 8 --mem-per-cpu 8G -p serc -t 24:00:00 --wrap 'mafft --auto --thread 8 ",
    combined,
    " > ",
    aligned,
    "'\n",
    sep=""
  )
  
  sink()
  
  # 3. TRIMAL SCRIPT
  sink(paste0(rootdir, "sh_scripts/", gene_set, "_trimal.sh"))
  
  cat(
    "sbatch -J ", gene_set, "_trimal -c 4 --mem-per-cpu 4G -p serc -t 04:00:00 --wrap 'trimal -in ",
    aligned,
    " -out ",
    trimmed,
    " -gt 0.1'\n",
    sep=""
  )
  
  sink()
  
  # 4. FASTTREE SCRIPT
  sink(paste0(rootdir, "sh_scripts/", gene_set, "_fasttree.sh"))
  
  cat(
    "sbatch -J ", gene_set, "_fasttree -c 4 --mem-per-cpu 8G -p serc -t 08:00:00 --wrap 'FastTree -lg ",
    trimmed,
    " > ",
    tree,
    "'\n",
    sep=""
  )
  
  sink()
}

```

```{r generate commands}
# amoA
make_phylo_scripts(
  gene_set = "amoA",
  ref_file = paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/gene_trees/amoA/amo_diamond_et_al.faa"),
  gene_file = paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/gene_trees/amoA/amo_pmo_genes_06152026.fasta")
)

# nxr/nar
make_phylo_scripts(
  gene_set = "nxr_nar",
  ref_file = paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/gene_trees/nxr_nar/nxr_boddicker_mosier.fasta"),
  gene_file = paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/gene_trees/nxr_nar/nxr_nar_genes_06152026.fasta")
)
```

```{r program versions for record keeping}
#MAFFT v7.505
#trimal v1.4.rev22 build[2015-05-21]
#FastTree version 2.1.11
```

```{r tree results}
#Amo
  #OC2_500m_contig_147611_7 - OC2_500m_MAG_98
    #MAG has all three
  #OC4_2000m_contig_40164_2 = OC4_2000m_MAG_54
    #MAG has all three
  #OC3_3000m_contig_2947538_2 = OC3_3000m_MAG_132
    #MAG has all three

#Mmo
  #OC6_150m_contig_5247298_5 = OC6_150m_MAG_41
    #MAG has all 3 subunits, so replace all three to be methane
  #OC5_1000m_contig_3728025_2 OC5_1000m_MAG_46
    #MAG has 44 an 45
  #OC6_150m_contig_3486000_2 = OC6_150m_MAG_352
    #mag has al 3
  

#Only nxr/nar gene is not a nxr/nar
#OC2_50m_MAG_230, >OC2_50m_contig_521530_1, K00371

```

#edit annotation df with results
alex reports that all dsrAB findings are oxidative and all SDO have right residues, so will not edit those
use above results to edit the annotation table
```{r read in dataframe and remove any duplicates}
refined_auto_MAGs = read.csv(paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/refined_auto_MAGs_06152026.csv"))

refined_auto_MAGs$gene_description <- gsub("\\[EC([0-9])", "[EC:\\1", refined_auto_MAGs$gene_description)

refined_auto_MAGs_distinct <- distinct(refined_auto_MAGs)
```

```{r}
remove = read.csv(paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/gene_trees/06152026_genetree_to_remove.csv"))
remove$X = NULL
```

```{r}
remove_keys <- paste(remove$genome, remove$KO, remove$module, remove$header)

df <- refined_auto_MAGs_distinct %>%
  mutate(
    key = paste(genome, KO, module, header),
    present = if_else(key %in% remove_keys, 0L, present)
  ) %>%
  select(-key)
```

```{r}
write.csv(df, paste0(rootdir, "/refined_analysis/refined_auto_MAGs_edited_06152026.csv"))
```
